mapper.select: SELECT tb_role.ROLE_CD, tb_role.ROLE_NM, tb_emp_role.IS_DEFAULT, IF(tb_emp_role.EMP_ID IS NOT NULL, 'Y', 'N') AS HAS_ROLE FROM tb_role LEFT JOIN TB_EMP_ROLE ON tb_role.ROLE_CD = tb_emp_role.ROLE_CD AND tb_emp_role.EMP_ID = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emp_role (EMP_ID, ROLE_CD, IS_DEFAULT) VALUES (#{empId}, #{roleCd}, 'N')
